title: 3 BHK Apartment in Andheri West
description: Spacious 3BHK apartment on the 12th floor with a beautiful city view. The apartment features a large living room, modular kitchen with chimney, 3 bedrooms with attached wardrobes, 2 modern bathrooms with premium fittings, and a covered car parking spot. Located in a well-maintained society with 24/7 security, gym, swimming pool, and children's play area. Walking distance from Andheri Metro station and DN Nagar. Schools, hospitals, and markets within 1km radius.

title: 2 BHK Flat for Rent in Koramangala
description: Fully furnished 2BHK flat in the heart of Koramangala. Comes with AC in both bedrooms, washing machine, refrigerator, microwave, sofa set, dining table, and beds with mattresses. Gated community with CCTV surveillance, covered parking, and maintained garden. Close to Forum Mall, Jyoti Nivas College, and multiple IT parks. Ideal for working professionals or small families.

title: Independent House in Jayanagar
description: Well-built independent house on a 30x40 site in the prestigious Jayanagar 4th Block. Ground + 2 floors with 4 spacious bedrooms, each with attached bathroom. Italian marble flooring, teak wood doors and windows, spacious car porch for 2 cars, and a beautiful terrace garden. Located on a 60-foot wide road with excellent connectivity. Khata A property with clear title. Near Jayanagar Shopping Complex and Metro station.

title: Luxury Villa for Rent in Whitefield
description: Premium fully furnished villa in a gated villa community in Whitefield. Features include private garden, jacuzzi, home theatre room, modular kitchen with all appliances, servant quarters, and 2-car garage. The villa community offers a clubhouse, tennis court, cricket pitch, and Olympic-size swimming pool. 5 minutes from ITPL and Phoenix Marketcity. Perfect for expat families or senior executives.

title: Residential Plot in Electronic City
description: BMRDA approved residential plot in a well-developed layout near Electronic City Phase 2. All amenities like underground drainage, wide tar roads, streetlights, water supply, and electricity connection are already in place. Near Infosys and Wipro campuses. Schools, hospitals, and supermarkets within 2km. Excellent investment opportunity with high appreciation potential. Clear title with all legal documents ready.

title: Commercial Office Space in BKC
description: Premium Grade A office space in Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai's premier business district. The space features a large open floor plan suitable for 40-50 workstations, 2 conference rooms, a pantry area, and 2 washrooms. Building amenities include high-speed lifts, central AC, DG backup, ample visitor parking, and a cafeteria. Close to BKC Metro station and major banks. Ideal for MNCs, financial services, and consulting firms.

title: 1 BHK Apartment in Powai
description: Compact yet well-designed 1BHK in a reputed society in Powai. Features include a spacious bedroom with wardrobe, modern bathroom with hot water, modular kitchen with exhaust, and a small balcony with lake view. Society amenities include gym, jogging track, and 24/7 security. Near IIT Bombay, Hiranandani Gardens, and multiple IT parks. Excellent for young professionals and newly married couples.

title: PG Accommodation in HSR Layout
description: Well-maintained PG accommodation for working professionals in HSR Layout. Single and double sharing rooms available. Includes bed, wardrobe, study table, AC, Wi-Fi, daily housekeeping, and laundry service. Meals included (breakfast + dinner). Common areas include a lounge, terrace, and washing machine access. 10 minutes walk from HSR BDA Complex and multiple bus stops. Near major IT companies in Outer Ring Road.

title: Shop Space in Connaught Place
description: Prime commercial shop space on the ground floor in Connaught Place, Delhi's iconic business and shopping hub. The shop has an excellent frontage of 20 feet on the main corridor with high footfall. Suitable for retail showroom, restaurant, brand outlet, or banking. Freehold property with clear title. Near Rajiv Chowk Metro station (largest metro interchange in Delhi). One of the highest-return commercial properties in North India.

title: 2 BHK Apartment for Rent in Adyar
description: Well-ventilated 2BHK apartment on the 3rd floor in a quiet residential area of Adyar. The flat has cross-ventilation, vitrified tile flooring, modular kitchen with granite platform, and both bedrooms with attached bathrooms. Geyser and fan in all rooms included. Near Adyar bus depot, IIT Madras, and Elliot's Beach. Close to schools like PSBB and Vidya Mandir. Ideal for families and students.
